genre_refs: Mid-century American magazine cover illustration (Edward Stevenson); Norman Rockwell-style Americana
description: Reproduction of a painted illustration titled 'Pledge of Allegiance' by Edward Stevenson. The painterly oil-style illustration depicts a group of young white people, teenagers and children, looking upward toward a large American flag that fills the right side of the frame. A young woman in the foreground with auburn 1940s-styled hair holds the lower red and white striped portion of the flag; beside her a boy in a white shirt and blue tie holds the flagpole aloft. Behind them are other young people, including a boy in a Boy Scout-style campaign hat blowing a bugle, a saluting cadet, and a girl in a beret. The palette is saturated reds, whites, and blues. There is no overlaid on-image text or agency logo on the graphic itself. The tweet caption reads 'America will Rise, stronger than ever before. "Pledge of Allegiance" Edward Stevenson'.
notable_text: No on-image text. Tweet caption: 'America will Rise, stronger than ever before. “Pledge of Allegiance” —Edward Stevenson'
